initializeMetadata.title: Initialize Typography Metadata
initializeMetadata.message:
This will push the default typography options (Fonts, Categories, Defaults) to your database. This is usually only needed once or when adding new fonts to the system.

Continue?

rebuild.title: Trigger Site Rebuild
rebuild.message:
This will trigger a full site rebuild and deployment. You can track the progress in real-time below.

Continue?

messages.requested: Request sent! Waiting for GitHub to start the build...

status.title: Site Status & Maintenance

status.maintenanceConfigDesc: Configure progress, end date, and an optional contact link for the full-screen maintenance page.

behaviorList.testingDesc: Adds an overlay but the site remains usable.

identity.title: Shape how the portfolio is recognized in tabs, branding, and collection filters.

preview.title: Identity preview

preview.filtersConfigured: Project and blog filters are configured
preview.filtersPending: Finish both filter lists for faster content sorting

checklist: Keep the page title short enough to read cleanly in the browser tab.
Use a favicon with strong contrast and minimal detail.
Match filter names to the content visitors actually browse.

header.title: Tune the public-facing type hierarchy while keeping the admin workspace readable.
header.description: Presets, base sizing, and role-level controls now sit next to live previews so decisions feel faster and more confident.

meta.typeRolesHint: Logo, nav, body, footer, and admin surfaces
meta.quickPresetsHint: Apply a brand direction in one click

global.title: Global typography controls

roles.title: Fine-tune every text role
roles.description: Each role can choose its own family, weight, italic state, and size while keeping the overall system organized.

preview.title: Validate typography before saving
preview.description: Preview how the type system behaves across navigation, content, footer, and admin surfaces.

preview.adminOverrideDesc: Keep dashboard text in Inter regardless of the public typography choices above.
preview.liveDesc: These previews mirror your real site regions so hierarchy issues are easier to catch before publishing.

regions.previewDesc: Check how the font system behaves across public and admin surfaces before saving.

content.heading: Heading - Sample Text
content.bodyPrefix: This is a sample paragraph to preview the body text font. The

visuals.title: Tune the atmosphere, motion, and UI feedback of the portfolio and admin dashboard.
visuals.description: Background energy and interface behavior are grouped separately now, so it is easier to shape the site mood without losing operational clarity.

atmosphere.title: Background Atmosphere
atmosphere.subtitle: Set the visual mood of the public site
atmosphere.description: Choose the scene and then fine-tune the amount of movement, density, and glow so the background supports the content instead of overpowering it.

container.title: Container Appearance
container.subtitle: Glassmorphism & Surfaces
container.description: Control the transparency, blur, and base color of UI containers across the entire portfolio and admin dashboard.

behavior.title: Interface Behavior
behavior.subtitle: Enable the experience defaults you want
behavior.description: These switches affect how interactive, chatty, and persistent the interface feels for both visitors and admins.

guidance.title: Direction
guidance.subtitle: Visual guidance
guidance.description: Use these quick checks to keep the overall experience expressive without making the portfolio hard to read.

fields.variantHint: Choose the visual pattern for the site background
fields.particleDensityHint: Control how full or minimal the scene feels.
fields.animationSpeedHint: Move slower for calm or faster for a more energetic canvas.
fields.glowIntensityHint: Raise this when the scene needs more contrast and visual depth.
fields.glassOpacityHint: Control how translucent the containers appear.
fields.backdropBlurHint: Set the intensity of the glass blur effect.
fields.surfaceBaseColorHint: The primary hue for containers and cards.

interactive.title: Interactive mouse effect
interactive.description: Let particles or shapes respond to pointer movement for a more tactile public experience.

notifications.title: Notification alerts
notifications.description: Show toast feedback in the admin interface for save, delete, and sync actions.

sidebar.title: Persistent admin sidebar
sidebar.description: Keep the navigation expanded so the dashboard feels stable during longer editing sessions.

checklist: Lower density and glow if the content starts fighting the background.
Keep sidebar persistence on for longer admin sessions and off for compact browsing.
Leave notifications enabled unless you are troubleshooting UI noise.

sync.title: Manage deployment targets and manual rebuild control from one cleaner sync workspace.
sync.description: Mirror environments and rebuild settings are separated now, so it is easier to understand what is being deployed where and when.
sync.syncHealth: Current sync health for manual deployment requests
sync.tokenHint: Saved locally in your browser for rebuild access

mirrorsSection.title: Mirror Environments
mirrorsSection.subtitle: Manage every deployment destination
mirrorsSection.description: Keep your live portfolio mirrors organized so you always know which URLs represent production, backup, and alternate hosting.

rebuild.title: Manual Rebuild
rebuild.subtitle: GitHub Actions deployment control
rebuild.description: Trigger a rebuild and deployment of the live site without leaving the admin panel.
rebuild.tokenHint: Used only for triggering site rebuilds. Stored locally in your browser.

note.title: Important Note
note.subtitle: No-backend rebuild flow
note.description: The rebuild action depends on your GitHub token because deployment is handled through hosted CI rather than a custom backend.
note.label: Note:
note.message: Enter a valid GitHub token above before triggering a rebuild. This keeps the hosting flow backend-free while still allowing controlled deployments.
